Third tone Second tone Second tone

Simplified: 李明，下课以后你有事儿吗？
Traditional: 李明，下課以後你有事兒嗎？
Pinyin: Lǐ Míng, xià kè yǐ hòu nǐ yǒu shìr ma?
English: Li Ming, do you have something to do after class?

Simplified: 我想去图书馆，有什么事儿吗？
Traditional: 我想去圖書館，有什麼事兒嗎？
Pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù tú shū guǎn, yǒu shén me shìr ma?
English: I want to go to the library, why?

Simplified: 你认识不认识我的朋友张文？
Traditional: 你認識不認識我的朋友張文？
Pinyin: Nǐ rèn shi bú rèn shi wǒ de péng yǒu Zhāng Wén?
English: Do you know my friend Zhang Wen?

Simplified: 我认识她。我们一起上数学课。
Traditional: 我認識她。我們一起上數學課。
Pinyin: Wǒ rèn shi tā. Wǒ men yì qǐ shàng shù xué kè.
English: I know her. We take math class together.
